landing.title: Default landing page
landing.description: Where the app takes you after you sign in. Changes apply on your next login.

dateTime.title: Date, time & timezone
dateTime.description: How timestamps render across the panel (logs, devices, tokens). Server always stores in UTC; the UI converts to your chosen timezone and format.

server.title: RustDesk server
server.description: The values surfaced on the public /join/:token invite page so end users can paste them into their RustDesk client. Saved values override the container env. Leave a field blank to fall back to the env default.
server.idRelayHint: Hostname (and optional port) where your hbbs + hbbr run. Both ID server and Relay server fields of the client will use this.
server.panelUrlHint: Public URL used when displaying invite links. Must include the scheme (https:// or http://).
server.publicKeyHint: Contents of id_ed25519.pub on the hbbs host. Users paste this into the "Key" field of the client settings so they authenticate the server.
server.connectivityDescription: TCP-probes the hbbs + hbbr ports and shows the last device heartbeat we received. Use this when the device list looks empty or every peer is Offline — it tells you whether the relay itself is reachable.
server.connectivityHint: Not run yet. Press the button to probe the server.

security.changePasswordDescription: Changes take effect on next sign-in. Your current session stays valid until its JWT expires.
security.guardrailsDescription: Read-only summary of the auth and abuse-prevention limits in effect. Changes to these require redeploying with the matching env vars.

advanced.exportDescription: Download the editable runtime settings as a .env-style file. Useful when migrating to a new host. Secrets (RD_SECRET_KEY, RD_ADMIN_PASSWORD, RD_CLIENT_SHARED_SECRET) are never included — copy those from your source env.

appearance.themeDescription: Switch between light and dark. The saved value follows this browser — your server's other admins have their own preference.
appearance.accentDescription: Applied to primary buttons, links, and focus rings across the app.
appearance.fontSizeDescription: Scale the entire UI. 100% is the default.
appearance.previewDescription: Reacts in real time as you change the settings above.
